grader.method: Read the current 31-page reader snapshot in canonical order, top to bottom, before assigning any page judgment; scored each complete learner journey against the four rubric dimensions without consulting prior grades.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The course home orients beginners to a six-part progression from probability foundations through a controlled research study.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page presents a coherent cumulative route, makes prerequisites and evidence boundaries visible, and gives each track a concrete learner-facing purpose. Its sequencing supports informed entry into the course without overstating what completion proves.
revisionPriorities: Trim repeated course-contract language where the same promise is already expressed by the track map.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson establishes generation as sampling from a learned distribution and separates probability mass, support, and sample quality.
wholePageReview.feedback: Definitions, finite examples, prediction gates, and changed-case checks form a strong first-principles learning loop. The page consistently distinguishes a deterministic browser fixture from evidence about a trained model.
revisionPriorities: Make the transition from the finite table to high-dimensional model distributions one sentence more explicit.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson derives sequence likelihood, negative log-likelihood, and cross-entropy from token probabilities.
wholePageReview.feedback: The arithmetic is correct, the additive log-space mechanism is inspectable, and the assessments test the effect of a changed token probability rather than recall alone. Boundaries around calibration and sample quality prevent likelihood from becoming an all-purpose quality claim.
revisionPriorities: State the logarithm base beside the first numerical NLL calculation to remove the last implicit convention.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson connects random draws, seeds, temperature, and truncation to observable changes in a categorical sampler.
wholePageReview.feedback: Learners predict before sampling, inspect empirical counts, and transfer the mechanism to a changed distribution. The page correctly treats seeds as replay controls rather than guarantees across implementations and keeps finite-sample fluctuation distinct from probability.
revisionPriorities: Add a compact side-by-side reminder that temperature reshapes probabilities while top-k changes support.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson compares directional KL divergence with symmetric distance-style summaries using finite distributions.
wholePageReview.feedback: The worked values and support-mismatch cases accurately expose directionality, asymmetry, and infinite penalties. Prediction-led comparisons and transfer questions require learners to choose a measure from the decision rather than from familiarity.
revisionPriorities: Surface the support requirement immediately beside the first KL formula as well as in the later boundary.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone integrates distribution specification, likelihood, sampling, and divergence into a reproducible finite workbench.
wholePageReview.feedback: The staged build, runnable CPU starter, local gates, worked evidence contract, and bounded claims make the project unusually complete and self-contained. Some requirements recur across overview, stages, exemplar, and reference, increasing reading load without changing the decision.
revisionPriorities: Compress duplicated manifest and evidence-boundary instructions while retaining the attempt gate and machine-readable contract.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson traces factorized sequence probability, teacher-forced training, and left-to-right sampling.
wholePageReview.feedback: Inputs, conditional factors, target shifts, and exposure differences are explained with concrete tokens and locally checked code. The learning journey correctly distinguishes parallel training evaluation from sequential generation and tests a changed prefix.
revisionPriorities: Reduce repeated restatements of the train-versus-generate distinction after the worked trace.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson introduces latent variables as hidden causes that are marginalized to produce observed-data probabilities.
wholePageReview.feedback: The mixture calculation makes posterior responsibility and marginalization observable without assuming prior jargon. Later practice cleanly separates a useful representation from proof that a latent coordinate has a human-assigned meaning.
revisionPriorities: Add the normalization denominator beside the first posterior-responsibility prose trace for faster visual checking.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson builds the ELBO from an amortized approximate posterior and explains reparameterized gradients.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page balances plain-language motivation with the precise reconstruction and KL terms, then traces how noise is externalized for differentiation. Objective checks and transfer cases diagnose sign mistakes and unsupported interpretations rather than rewarding formula recognition.
revisionPriorities: Keep the ELBO and negative-loss sign conventions visible together in the code section to further reduce sign confusion.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson diagnoses posterior collapse by combining KL behavior, latent sensitivity, and reconstruction evidence.
wholePageReview.feedback: It correctly rejects low KL as a sufficient diagnosis and uses an active-unit variance fixture to expose the mechanism. The changed cases preserve alternative explanations and route learners toward a multi-signal diagnosis and targeted retry.
revisionPriorities: Name decoder capacity as an alternative cause at the first diagnostic table, not only in the later boundary discussion.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone asks learners to build and audit a latent-variable generator with reconstruction, prior-sample, and collapse evidence.
wholePageReview.feedback: The project provides an executable baseline, staged checkpoints, failure preservation, deterministic completeness checks, and an attempt-gated reference. It makes clear which results are local execution, reviewed fixtures, or planned interventions, though the repeated contract language makes the page dense.
revisionPriorities: Consolidate recurring starter, manifest, and evidence-label instructions into one persistent project checklist.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson derives density correction under an invertible transformation from conservation of probability mass.
wholePageReview.feedback: The interval-width example, inverse mapping, Jacobian factor, and support boundary agree mathematically and narratively. Learners predict a changed scaling case and must distinguish point motion from density change.
revisionPriorities: Place the one-dimensional absolute-derivative form immediately before the multidimensional determinant notation.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson composes invertible transforms and tractable log-determinants into a normalizing-flow likelihood.
wholePageReview.feedback: A coupling-layer trace makes inversion and triangular Jacobians concrete, while the assessments distinguish expressivity from tractability. The evidence stays within deterministic arithmetic and avoids implying trained density quality.
revisionPriorities: Clarify that each composed log-determinant is evaluated at the intermediate state produced by the preceding transforms.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson turns energy values into relative probability mass and explains the partition-function obstacle.
wholePageReview.feedback: The finite-state normalization is numerically correct and shows why lowering one energy changes every normalized probability. Practice and transfer cleanly separate relative scoring, normalization, and sampling evidence.
revisionPriorities: Introduce the additive-energy invariance explicitly beside the first normalized example.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson traces Langevin proposals and Metropolis-adjusted acceptance for an energy target.
wholePageReview.feedback: Proposal drift, noise, reverse-density correction, and acceptance arithmetic are all inspectable and consistent. Learners commit before the accept/reject reveal and then diagnose step-size and finite-chain limitations on a changed case.
revisionPriorities: Keep the proposal variance convention adjacent to the Langevin update so implementations cannot silently change the acceptance ratio.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone integrates invertible density evaluation with energy-based sampling and matched diagnostics.
wholePageReview.feedback: Learners receive a runnable CPU baseline, explicit round-trip and sampler checks, a controlled intervention, failure logging, and a bounded reference artifact. The end-to-end evidence chain is excellent, but repeated project-contract statements slow the transition from instruction to action.
revisionPriorities: Collapse duplicated overview and exemplar requirements into a single stage-indexed evidence checklist.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson introduces Gaussian corruption as a controlled mixture of signal and noise that supports denoising learning.
wholePageReview.feedback: The numeric trace correctly applies square-root coefficients and shows how signal-to-noise changes with time. Prediction, code, and transfer tasks consistently distinguish a browser fixture from a learned reverse process.
revisionPriorities: Add a one-line check that the signal and noise variance coefficients sum to one under the chosen parameterization.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson interprets the score as a log-density gradient and derives the conditional Gaussian denoising target.
wholePageReview.feedback: Signs, scaling by noise variance, and weighting are handled accurately in the worked values. The changed cases force learners to reason about direction and magnitude while explicit boundaries prevent a local score fixture from becoming a global sampling claim.
revisionPriorities: Repeat the sign sanity check at the first code reveal because it is the highest-risk beginner error.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson connects DDPM corruption, noise prediction, clean-sample reconstruction, and equivalent prediction parameterizations.
wholePageReview.feedback: The formulas and concrete conversion trace are correct, shapes and schedule terms are explicit, and assessments diagnose parameterization mismatch rather than mere vocabulary. The narrative also bounds the simplified loss relative to the full variational objective.
revisionPriorities: Keep epsilon-, x-zero-, and velocity-prediction conversion formulas in one persistent comparison block.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson separates training noise schedules from inference timestep selection and stochastic versus deterministic samplers.
wholePageReview.feedback: The DDIM-style step is numerically inspectable, model-call budgeting is explicit, and the changed cases show why fewer steps do not automatically imply an equivalent trajectory or quality. Evidence labels remain honest about deterministic fixtures.
revisionPriorities: Add a compact timeline showing training indices versus the inference subsequence to reinforce the two schedule roles.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone guides a complete course-scale diffusion build from corruption arithmetic through sampling and schedule comparison.
wholePageReview.feedback: The runnable starter, smoke/full profiles, invariant checks, failure preservation, matched changed case, rubric, and artifact boundary create a rigorous self-contained project. Repeated evidence-contract prose adds density but does not obscure the required action or decision.
revisionPriorities: Merge repeated command and evidence-boundary explanations into the build stage while retaining the separate attempt-gated exemplar.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson shows how condition information enters a generator and how adherence must be evaluated separately from sample quality.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page defines conditioning mechanisms before use, traces condition and sample shapes, and asks learners to diagnose ignored or conflicting conditions. Transfer checks require evidence appropriate to the condition rather than visual impression alone.
revisionPriorities: Place marginal and joint adherence definitions side by side at their first use.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson derives classifier-free guidance by combining conditional and unconditional predictions and examines its trade-offs.
wholePageReview.feedback: The interpolation/extrapolation mechanism, guidance-scale arithmetic, and evidence limits are accurate. Prediction-led changed cases prevent the common mistake that larger guidance guarantees better or safer samples.
revisionPriorities: Label the course's guidance-scale convention directly on every formula because alternate conventions exist in the literature.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson frames editing and inverse problems as balancing a measurement constraint with a generative prior.
wholePageReview.feedback: The forward operator, residual, update, and null-space ambiguity are concretely traced, and the learner must distinguish observation consistency from recovery of the unique truth. Changed cases and deterministic feedback expose unsupported reconstruction claims.
revisionPriorities: Show one additional null-space pair beside the first ambiguity explanation to make non-uniqueness instantly visible.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson analyzes composition as a multi-objective control problem with joint adherence, conflicts, and non-compensable gates.
wholePageReview.feedback: Marginal-versus-joint success is calculated correctly, conflict cases are explicit, and the page avoids collapsing fidelity, diversity, consistency, and safety into one score. The decision tasks require a bounded release choice with a retry path.
revisionPriorities: Introduce the joint-adherence gap formula immediately before the first numerical comparison.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The capstone assembles condition, guidance, conflict, diversity, memorization, and release evidence into a generator audit.
wholePageReview.feedback: The paired condition-scale-seed matrix, hard gates, runnable baseline, failure routing, scoped null results, and attempt-gated reference support a defensible end-to-end decision. The same evidence contract is repeated in several capstone surfaces, creating avoidable density.
revisionPriorities: Consolidate duplicate matrix, manifest, and boundary instructions into a single persistent audit checklist.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson separates memory capacity, throughput, provenance, and exact-resume contracts for generative training systems.
wholePageReview.feedback: The 3.2-to-4.8 GB ledger, checkpoint-state audit, and immutable-data cases are correct and diagnostic. Learners classify the first divergent object and receive precise retries, while browser arithmetic is explicitly not presented as GPU measurement.
revisionPriorities: Add allocator and workspace headroom as a visible ledger row in the changed case, not only as a prose caveat.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson builds a provenance-aware memorization audit and scopes positive and null attack findings to a threat model.
wholePageReview.feedback: It correctly separates resemblance, training membership, rarity, extraction, consent, and privacy. The rare-canary and held-out controls, deterministic neighbor fixture, and changed cases teach learners to make the strongest supported claim without universalizing a finite attack.
revisionPriorities: Add one sentence distinguishing membership inference from direct extraction when the audit methods are first listed.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson teaches evaluation as a construct- and decision-specific comparison under explicitly matched resource units.
wholePageReview.feedback: Equal samples, model calls, and wall time are accurately distinguished, while uncertainty, slices, hard gates, and Pareto trade-offs prevent a false universal ranking. The code and transfer question expose a fifty-fold call-budget confound in an immediately checkable way.
revisionPriorities: Provide a small budget-unit table that lists what each matching choice controls and leaves confounded.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson specifies a portable smoke/full experiment contract and classifies expected results by evidence type.
wholePageReview.feedback: Invariant, variable observation, and reviewed-reference claims are separated precisely, with no fabricated performance band. The optional external run is bounded, provider-neutral, pinned, stoppable, and accompanied by artifacts and failure diagnostics while required learning remains local.
revisionPriorities: State earlier that the smoke profile intentionally omits checkpoint creation so learners do not infer resume was tested there.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The final capstone requires baseline reproduction followed by one predeclared, matched, seed-level generative intervention.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page makes baseline acceptance, paired analysis, uncertainty, failed-run preservation, null results, bounded conclusions, and falsifying next experiments operational. Its runnable baseline and attempt-gated artifact complete the learning loop, though repeated evidence-contract wording makes an already demanding project feel longer than necessary.
revisionPriorities: Deduplicate the capstone overview, exemplar, and reference while preserving the full machine-readable evidence schema.
